HGSS.543.0000:
They’re fresh out of Poké Balls!
When will they get more of them?
HGSS.543.0001:
Poké Balls are in stock!
Now I can catch Pokémon!
HGSS.543.0002:
When I was walking in the tall grass,
a Bug-type Pokémon poisoned\r
my Pokémon!\f
I just kept going, but my Pokémon
nearly fainted.\f
You should keep an Antidote with you.
